assets.rationale: Owns reusable prompt, workflow, playbook, and runbook artifacts plus the catalog, evaluator, receipts, schemas, and regression gates.
assets.destructive_gate: Not applicable. This is the canonical product.

assets.rationale: The file is byte-for-byte a historical PromptOS console Git object and contains no unique source work.
assets.destructive_gate: Delete only after the current canonical console is merged to main, opens successfully from the canonical checkout, and any desktop shortcut points to that checkout.

assets.rationale: Contains useful prompt, playbook, record, and migration ideas, but conflicts with the live dev-setup control-plane owner and its installer overwrites platform-owned files.
assets.destructive_gate: Do not install. Extract individual artifacts only after semantic comparison, schema-backed validation, platform-boundary repair, adversarial tests, and assignment to PromptOS, dev-setup, or agent-kit.

assets.rationale: Owns evidence-backed tool intake, adoption, quarantine, and benchmark decisions for the developer-agent control plane.
assets.destructive_gate: Not applicable. PromptOS may consume an exported catalog but must not become the authoring source.

assets.rationale: Owns a bounded self-prompting automation reference and safety envelope, not catalog content or PromptOS runtime behavior.
assets.destructive_gate: Not applicable. Expose status or documentation by link; do not copy the automation into the browser console.

assets.rationale: Owns the portable operating contract, bootstrap, trust tiers, verify gates, and repo ledgers. It does not own reusable prompts or the PromptOS console.
assets.destructive_gate: Keep separate until dev-setup proves a generated release path and parity check for every agent-kit contract.

assets.rationale: Owns ingestion, ranking, storage, and presentation of external news signals. PromptOS may display a bounded signal snapshot or deep link, but must not absorb the application.
assets.destructive_gate: Not applicable. Any adapter must be read-only, provenance-labeled, and unable to expose NewsWatch credentials.

assets.rationale: Contains a static producer-to-catalog adapter prototype and prior-art notes. Its reusable contract should be extracted, not preserved as a second console product.
assets.destructive_gate: Inventory source configuration and producer behavior against NewsWatch, migrate unique non-secret adapter logic, verify equivalent output, then retire the prototype.

assets.rationale: The repository contains an aspirational README and fleet boilerplate, with no unique product implementation to merge.
assets.destructive_gate: Confirm no releases, packages, deployments, open product PRs, or external consumers, then archive the GitHub repository with a pointer to PromptOS.

assets.rationale: The repository contains an aspirational README and fleet boilerplate, with no unique product implementation to merge.
assets.destructive_gate: Confirm no releases, packages, deployments, open product PRs, or external consumers, then archive the GitHub repository with a pointer to PromptOS.

assets.rationale: A separate dev-setup checkout contains related subprojects but is not the canonical PromptOS product.
assets.destructive_gate: Reconcile its branch, unpushed commits, worktrees, and uncommitted changes against the authoritative dev-setup checkout before removal.

assets.rationale: A separate dev-setup checkout contains related subprojects but is not the canonical PromptOS product.
assets.destructive_gate: Reconcile its branch, unpushed commits, worktrees, and uncommitted changes against the authoritative dev-setup checkout before removal.
